name: GIGABYTE H610M S2H DDR4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel H610 Chipset - Support DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Connector - USB 3.2 Gen1 - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - DVI-D - D-Sub - Intel Gigabit LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE H610M S2H DDR4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro ATX Intel H610 motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with DDR4-3200 and multiple video outputs.
